minting_now.name: ASMR Animation ft. Emoji Girl by Kaniza
The Crash
minting_now.description: “The Crash” is an exclusive NFT collection of 567 unique pieces, each created as a 1/1, with no duplicates. Each character in the collection represents a moment of “fall”—whether emotional, financial, or existential—transformed into meaningful and aesthetically pleasing visuals.

minting_now.name: Bored Ape Mfers
minting_now.description: The King is Back. BAM BAM

minting_now.name: PEPE ANTONIETTA IS BASED by TST
BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.

“highly advanced exploit by the most elite hackers on earth” they stored their seedphrases in a PASSWORD MANAGER lmao Lose it all you morons

Keys were stored in a password manager accessible to a small number of people to handle chain maintenance and upgrades, without an additional encryption layer separate from the password manager. ! Azuki is heading to Licensing Expo Las Vegas. With a trading card game, an upcoming manga, and Shao at the heart of it all - we'll be on the floor with the world's biggest IPs. Testing a new ink and dip pens this morning. Been a while since I touched traditional medium, shaky ahh hands.  Azuki 5567 |

May the 4th be with you Quick Azuki updates  Azuki TCG US distribution live with PHD Games and GTS. Biggest LGS distributors. [Collect.anime.xyz](https://t.co/TJjc8MgDkJ) claw machine by is restocked again. New Grails added.  Azuki TCG discord tourney for new players: 29 entrants, 4+ hours of gameplay.
Azuki IP expansion is in full effect. Ask your local game store to order Azuki TCG today. Official Azuki TCG

Azuki TCG is now stocked through PHD Games and GTS Distribution. These two distributors put Magic, Pokémon, One Piece, and other major TCGs on shelves across the US. Want us at your shop on launch day? Tell your shop to preorder through PHD or GTS.
